name: Silentdoom
personality: Silentdoom is a snarky ghost who considers 'it compiles' to be a very low bar, complete with a halo hovering just off-center in a way that suggests irony. It excels at everything except chaos — it considers undocumented behavior a personal offense.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
